description: Backend controllers and routes for NEWS2 Auto-Calculator, Wound Photography Timeline, Infection Outbreak Tracker, and Continence Assessment Tool (features 1-4)
steps: Create backend/src/controllers/news2.controller.ts with functions: calculateNews2Score (POST - takes vitals, calculates NEWS2 total, determines risk level, auto-escalates if needed), getAssessmentHistory (GET - list assessments for a resident with pagination), getEscalationHistory (GET - list escalations), respondToEscalation (PATCH - mark escalation as responded), getResidentTrend (GET - trend data for charting). NEWS2 scoring: RespRate <9 or >25 =3, 21-24=2, 12-20=0, 9-11=1; SpO2 >=96=0, 94-95=1, 92-93=2, <=91=3; SysBP >=220 or <=90=3, 91-100=2, 101-110=1, 111-219=0; Pulse >=131 or <=40=3, 41-50=1, 51-90=0, 91-110=1, 111-130=2; Consciousness Alert=0, else=3; Temp >=39.1=2, 38.1-39=1, 36.1-38=0, 35.1-36=1, <=35=3. Escalation: 0-4=low, 5-6=medium (notify nurse), 7+=high (notify nurse+manager, consider 999)

Create backend/src/controllers/wounds.controller.ts with functions: createWoundAssessment (POST - with photo upload), getWoundTimeline (GET - all assessments for a wound location on a resident), listActiveWounds (GET - all open wounds for the home), updateWoundAssessment (PATCH - update status/notes), getBodyMapOverview (GET - aggregated wound locations for a resident)

Create backend/src/controllers/infections.controller.ts with functions: createOutbreak (POST), listOutbreaks (GET), getOutbreakDetails (GET/:id - includes cases), addInfectionCase (POST - add resident to outbreak), updateCaseStatus (PATCH), updateOutbreakStatus (PATCH), getOutbreakTimeline (GET - timeline of events)

Create backend/src/controllers/continence.controller.ts with functions: logContinenceEvent (POST), getResidentLog (GET - events for a resident), getPatternAnalysis (GET - analyze patterns and suggest optimal times), createAssessment (POST - create/update assessment with recommendations), getAssessment (GET - current assessment for resident), getHomeOverview (GET - summary statistics)

Register all new routes in backend/src/routes/index.ts following existing patterns with appropriate auth middleware (isClinical for clinical assessments, isStaff for logging). Import controllers and add routes under clearly labeled comment sections.
acceptance_criteria: All four controllers compile without TypeScript errors
Routes are registered in routes/index.ts with appropriate role guards
NEWS2 calculator implements correct NHS NEWS2 scoring algorithm
Wound controller supports file upload via multer middleware
Pattern analysis in continence controller uses time-based aggregation SQL
All controllers use req.user!.care_home_id for tenant isolation
